meaning: n.鍗佽冻绫籥dj.鏈夊崄鑴氱殑
examples: A decapod crustacean has ten limbs.
"I'm controlling it with medication, " I say, calmly sucking down the last of the decapod's tasty, tasty flesh.
They say they now believe that all decapod crustaceans - a group that also includes lobsters and crayfish - would show the same response.
